caption:
Petite styling secret for instant polish? High-waisted bottoms! 🤍
They create an illusion of longer legs and define your waist beautifully.
It’s my favorite way to look chic and expensive on a budget.
What's your go-to high-waist piece?

Just styled this midi skirt without it overwhelming my 4'11" frame!
The secret for petites? A fitted top and defined waist for balanced proportions.
What's your go-to trick for styling longer pieces? 🕊️

15 pieces = 30+ outfits 🤍

My petite capsule wardrobe system:
3 bottoms + 4 tops + 2 blazers + 2 dresses
All neutral. Everything matches.
